HelpDescription:
I can provide an answer to most of your (Limbus-related) curiosities.
If you seek she who holds the answers, Faust is the name to remember.
...No, let me restate myself.
Not just most. _All_ of them.
HelpItems:
Faust is here to help look for any query you might have, so learn to speak the language of Faust beforehand.
For further command help, see```/limbus query:help identity``````/limbus query:help ego``````/limbus query:help skills```

Faust also has access to certain databases.
For Refraction Railway information:```/limbus query:help rr```For the Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gifts:```/limbus query:help gift```Player-used status effects are available:
```/limbus query:help status```

Discord places limitations on bots, just like your 2000 character per message limit. Wordings are changed to try and fit things to those limits. If this bothers you, direct your annoyance to Neo in the server linked in Faust's bio.
HelpFooter:
Changelog is available via /limbus help changelog

Also to any server owners: Consider restraining this Faust to a bot channel. Some Skills and queries can be... large.
-Diligent and Organized Faust

HelpDescription: Proper credits delayed because dev is stupid (forgot). Oops.
HelpItems: Maintaining the LCB Organized Assets Drive. Thumbnails derived directly from there.

Making it easy to double-check typos or outright incorrect information loaded into Faust.
Also the *extensive* list of E.G.O Gifts and their upgrades.
Oifey as a huge inspiration to how to make Faust function.

Specific IDs can be searched with just the Identity and/or Sinner's names:```/limbus query:id spicebush yi sang```Faust will try and pick out the sinner's name if you do this. Otherwise, Faust will ignore any spaces and punctuation, and will attempt partial matches if possible. Thusly:```/limbus query:id love and hate```...will still match Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of **Love and Hate**.

Always-active passives (Read: Pequod Captain Ishmael's 'Hour of the Hunt', Index Yi Sang's five passives that provide him his unique mechanics, etc.) will not be displayed in full on IDs, largely to the fault of the latter threatening to overload the 6000 character limit imposed by Discord.

IDs can be searched by filters applied to them, all of which will require exact matching:
```/limbus query:id -trait blade lineage```Filters for the 'Blade Lineage' trait.
```/limbus query:id -e poise potency```Filters for IDs that can gain Poise Potency **either directly or indirectly.**
```/limbus query:id -se poise potency```Filters for IDs that can gain Poise Potency **directly via Skill, Coin, or Passive effects.**
```/limbus query:id -keyword poise```Filters for IDs that qualify for Poise E.G.O Gifts, i.e. their Poise is gained **directly via Base Skill or Coin effects, not via Passives or statuses.**
```/limbus query:id -season 2```Filters for IDs that are listed as Season 2 in the Dispenser.
```/limbus query:id -sin wrath```Filters for IDs that have a Wrath Skill. You may omit searching a sin to change the additional info below an ID to their Base Skill sin loadout.
```/limbus query:id -damage pierce```Filters for IDs that have a Pierce Skill. You may omit searching a damage type to change the additional info below an ID to their Base Skill damage type loadout.
```/limbus query:id -sortby hp```...will sort IDs by HP.

Specific IDs can be searched with just the E.G.O and/or Sinner's names:```/limbus query:ego bygone days yi sang```
Faust will try and pick out the sinner's name if you do this. Otherwise, Faust will ignore any spaces and punctuation, and will attempt partial matches if an exact match fails. Thusly:```/limbus query:ego red eyes```
...will prioritize **Red Eyes** over Red Eyes (Open)

```/limbus query:ego ishmael -cost pride, gloom```Will filter for Ishmael E.G.O that have Pride and Gloom in their costs, and change the display to show the E.G.O's sin costs.
```/limbus query:ego -r he```Will filter for HE-grade E.G.O.

E.G.O can be searched by filters applied to them, all of which will require exact matching:```/limbus query:ego -e ally heal hp```Filters for IDs that can provide HP Healing for allies **either directly or indirectly.**
```/limbus query:ego -se ally heal hp```Filters for IDs that can provide HP Healing for allies **directly via Skill, Coin, or Passive effects.**
Of note, this will exclude 'Party Heal HP'.
```/limbus query:ego -season 2```Filters for E.G.O that are listed as Season 2 in the Dispenser.
```/limbus query:ego -sin wrath```Filters for E.G.O that are Wrath.
```/limbus query:ego -damage pierce```Filters for E.G.O that have a Pierce Awakening or Corrosion.

`-sort` will accept `maxpower, minpower, maxpotential, minpotential, maxclash, minclash` as modifiers in descending order. Do -sort asc 'whatever' to go the other direction.
Adding `-mod` will attempt to include additional coin modifiers, such as conditional Coin Power or Coin Reuse. Example:```/limbus query:ego -s ryoshu -sortby maxsum -mod```...will filter for Ryoshu's E.G.O, and sort the Awakenings and Corrosions by their final roll sums, including any power modifiers.
Unique to E.G.O, sorting by a sin (i.e. wrath, lust, envy) will sort by sin resists. Only one at a time though.

Specific Skills can be searched with just the Skill name.```/limbus query:skill lament mourn and despair```In the case of overlapping Skill names, you may filter by Sinner as well.```/limbus query:skill to claim their bones -s meursault```

Skills can be searched by filters applied to them, all of which will require exact matching:```/limbus query:skill -s1```Filters for only Skill 1s.```/limbus query:skill -s2 -noalt```Filters for only Base Skill 2s.```/limbus query:skill -s3 -alt```Filters for only Alternate Skill 3s.
`-sd` for Defense Skills, `-passive` for Passives, and `-support` for Support Skills will also be accepted.
```/limbus query:skill -e ally heal hp```Filters for Skills that can provide HP Healing for allies **either directly or indirectly (via status effects, such as K Corp. Ampules).**
```/limbus query:skill -se ally heal hp```Filters for Skills that can provide HP Healing for allies **directly via Skill, Coin, or Passive effects.**
Of note, this will exclude 'Party Heal HP'.
```/limbus query:skill -sin wrath```Filters for Skills that are Wrath.
[!] Of note, combining a Sin query with a Passive or Support query will have the effect of querying for Passives and Supports that only use those sins.
```/limbus query:skill -damage pierce```Filters for E.G.O that are Pierce.

`-sort` will accept `maxpower, minpower, maxsum, minsum, maxclash, minclash` as modifiers in descending order. Do -sort asc 'whatever' to go the other direction.
Adding `-mod` will attempt to include additional coin modifiers, such as conditional coin power or coin reuse. Example:```/limbus query:skill -noalt -sortby maxpower```...will filter for Base Skills, and sort them by their unmodified (Read: No Coin Power, Clash Power, Final Power, etc.) Final Power.

Faust has manually tagged every Identity, Skill, and E.G.O with the effects that they have, and it would likely be best to simply show you some examples.
For most positive effects, you may search for things such as `haste`, `ally heal sp`, and `party heal hp`
In this case, `ally` will be tagged with effects that target one or more allies, while `party` targets all the sinners on the field.
For most negative effects, you may search for things such as `attack power down` or `self tremor`
`charge` also comes with `charge support` for things such as AEDD Gregor's Spark Discharge, and effects such as `gaze` will be tagged with `pierce damage amp`
When searching tags, use -se instead of -e to avoid the above. As an example, ``-e rupture count`` causes AEDD Gregor to show up, as it's chained through Spark Discharge. ``-se rupture count`` prevents this, as the E.G.O does not directly inflict Rupture Count.
For consistency, please keep any effect queries to the actual effect's name, Faust will only deviate so far from glossary definitions.
For your benefit and curiosity, please see
```/limbus query:help tags```to see more specifics.
HelpFooter: To hopefully add some ease of use, ID and E.G.O pages have their effect tags listed in the footer.

HelpItems:
```party heal hp, ally heal hp, heal hp```For effects that heal HP. Replace HP with SP for... that.
```charge support```Will be tagged on skills that have any capacity for giving allies charge, such as Charge Barrier, Spark Discharge, or directly giving charge.
```burn spread```Effects like Ishmael's Ardor Blossom Star, where attacking enemies with Burn afflicts random enemies with Burn.
```self tremor count, ally tremor count```For the IDs that use Tremor as a do-nothing counter. Ally Tremor is an example if we ever get anything like that.

Faust has information available on enemies in Refraction Railway and their resists, to assist with planning and teambuilding.`-line`Denotes which Railway line you're looking for. Accepts either the Line Number (i.e. 2) or its name (i.e. Mobius), or will default to the latest/most current Railway Line.`-stop` Is required, and denotes which Stop of the Railway you're looking up. Same thing, Stop Number (i.e. 1) or its name (i.e. curse) ((Partial names are accepted.))
As of Line 4, Sections will be grouped together under the same 'Stop':```/limbus query:railway -line 4 -stop 2```...will provide Section 2 (The one with all the Peccatula Invidiae) rather than Stop 2 (The one with all the Butlers).
Names are Spoiler tagged for those who care. Faust asserts that this used to actually matter.

E.G.O Gifts and their available upgrades have been deemed a worthwhile addition, for those who need to reference such information.`-gift` Queries the gift name, `-e` Queries effects just like with IDs, Skills, and E.G.O.
`-keyword```Searches for keywords, `-abno` or `-source` Searches for the gift's source Abnormality or Theme Pack. 'fusion' will work for fusion gifts in this context. Example: ```/limbus query:gift -source yield my flesh```...will list gifts from both the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Theme Pack and its BokGak Theme Pack.

Status Effects are included for a sense of completeness with the ID and Gift Databases, for those who need to reference such information.`-status` Queries the status name, `-e` Queries effects just like with IDs, Skills, and E.G.O.
Example:```/limbus query:status flower burying```...will show results for both Flower-burying Wedge [埋花櫼] and Flower-burying Pin [埋花針].
